hero.heading:
Your AI-Powered
Messaging Platform
hero.subtitle: Streamline conversations across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger, TikTok, SMS, Email, and more — all in one intelligent platform built to grow your business.

whyChatDaddy.heading: Built for the full customer journey
whyChatDaddy.subtitle: From fast-moving startups to structured enterprises, ChatDaddy adapts to your team’s real-world workflows, not the other way around.

growthPartner.title: Your Growth Partner
growthPartner.description: We measure our success by yours. From onboarding to scaling, our team is here to help you unlock the full value of ChatDaddy.

onePlatform.title: One platform for the entire customer journey
onePlatform.description: From first touch to repeat purchase, ChatDaddy brings marketing, sales, and support into a single, streamlined workspace.

scalable.title: Scalable, flexible, and easy to use
scalable.description: Get started quickly, integrate with your favorite tools, and scale without adding complexity.

proven.title: Proven Messaging Automation
proven.description: With millions of conversations managed daily, we’ve built a platform that simplifies complexity so your team can focus on growth.

keyFeatures.heading: Build Around Your Growth
keyFeatures.subtitle: From attracting new prospects to retaining loyal customers, ChatDaddy equips your team with everything you need to grow — in one seamless platform.
keyFeatures.acquireHeading: From getting customers to converting leads…
keyFeatures.retainHeading: to keeping customers and managing your growth

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Expand your reach effortlessly by targeting potential customers through smart broadcasts, click-to-WhatsApp ads, and QR entry points.

shop.label: Shop
shop.description: Turn WhatsApp into a storefront. Showcase your catalog, take orders, and send payment links — all inside the chat.

chatbot.label: Chatbot
chatbot.description: Engage visitors 24/7 with an AI-powered chatbot that answers questions, qualifies leads, and books appointments.

pay.label: Pay
pay.description: Accept payments directly in WhatsApp. Generate payment links, send invoices, and track transactions seamlessly.

teamInbox.label: Team Inbox
teamInbox.description: Manage all conversations in one shared inbox. Assign chats, add notes, and collaborate with your team in real time.

notification.label: Notification
notification.description: Stay on top of every message with smart alerts. Get notified by priority, assignment, or keyword — never miss a lead.

automation.label: Automation
automation.description: Automate repetitive tasks with visual workflow builders. Set triggers, conditions, and actions without writing code.

crm.label: CRM
crm.description: Track every customer interaction. Tag contacts, score leads, and build segments for targeted outreach.

blog.heading: Tips, Guides & Updates
blog.subtitle: Expert insights on WhatsApp CRM, business automation, chatbot strategies, and messaging best practices from the ChatDaddy team.
blog.emptyMessage: We are working on insightful guides about WhatsApp business automation, chatbot strategies, and CRM best practices. Check back soon!

integration.heading: Connect WhatsApp with Your Favorite Tools
integration.subtitle: Seamlessly integrate ChatDaddy with your CRM, e-commerce platform, helpdesk, and more. Automate workflows and keep everything in sync.
integration.dontSeeDescription: ChatDaddy connects to thousands of apps through Zapier and Make. We also build custom integrations for enterprise customers.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
